example_jp: ビールが全部飲まれた。

example_en: I was scolded by the teacher.
My foot was stepped on in the train.
I was laughed at by everyone.
I was praised by the teacher.
I was asked to do the job.
I was troubled by them coming suddenly.
I was pushed on the train.
I was scolded by my boss.
I was used as a tool.
